content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年07月07日 周二
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [jamesob/local-llm](https://github.com/jamesob/local-llm)
   Everything I know about running LLMs locally | ⭐1069
2. [synthetic-sciences/openscience](https://github.com/synthetic-sciences/openscience)
   The open-source AI workbench for scientific research | ⭐760
3. [Kulaxyz/token-diet](https://github.com/Kulaxyz/token-diet)
   Always-on token-efficiency skill for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor,  | ⭐596
4. [Pluviobyte/rnskill](https://github.com/Pluviobyte/rnskill)
   雪踏乌云的 AI Agent Skills 集合 | ⭐320
5. [ai4s-research/open-science](https://github.com/ai4s-research/open-science)
   Open Science — an open AI workbench for scientists. Open-source alternative to C | ⭐230
6. [simonlin1212/Vibe-Research](https://github.com/simonlin1212/Vibe-Research)
   Vibe-Research: Your Personal Trading Research Agent · A股/美股/港股 的个人投研 Agent：每日复盘、 | ⭐161
7. [RennAkira/spicy-monopoly](https://github.com/RennAkira/spicy-monopoly)
   和你的 AI 一起玩的双人棋盘小游戏 · 18+ （A two-player board game you play with your AI — dice,  | ⭐124
8. [7-e1even/learn-agent](https://github.com/7-e1even/learn-agent)
   学习Agent开发的笔记 | ⭐82

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
